author: swag
text:
Tolerate bare repos in Store::discover

discover_git bailed on git_root's NotARepo (rev-parse --show-toplevel fails with no work tree) and fell through to no-git discovery, surfacing a misleading 'not initialized. Run bl init' on a fully-initialized bare hub. Every command from a bare root was unusable.

store_paths::require_git_repo tolerates the NotARepo error when the dir is genuinely a bare repo (reusing bare_squash::is_bare_repo, now pub(crate)); a real non-git dir keeps NotARepo so no-git fallback still works. Covered by tests/bare_discovery.rs.
